articles.title: New coalition calls for state crackdowns on prediction markets
articles.summary: A new coalition is pushing state governments to crack down on prediction markets through regulatory action or outright bans. This signals a coordinated effort that could fragment the US prediction market landscape, forcing platforms to navigate a patchwork of state-by-state restrictions similar to what sports betting faced before widespread legalization.

articles.title: Kalshi, Polymarket Combine for $17.9B February Volume as Polymarket Closes Gap
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket posted a combined $17.9 billion in trading volume for February, with Polymarket apparently narrowing the gap between the two platforms. The massive volume surge signals prediction markets are hitting mainstream adoption levels that will force regulators and traditional finance to take notice.

articles.title: DraftKings CEO on launch of new 'super app,' prediction markets and more
articles.summary: DraftKings CEO Jason Robins discussed the company's expansion into a "super app" that consolidates sports betting, daily fantasy, and potentially prediction markets under one platform. The move signals DraftKings is betting big on diversification beyond traditional sports wagering, which could bring prediction markets to millions of mainstream users if they pull the trigger.

articles.title: AP to provide Kalshi its gold standard elections data ahead of primaries
articles.summary: The Associated Press will supply Kalshi with its election data for upcoming primary races, giving the prediction market access to the news organization's authoritative vote tallies and race calls. This partnership legitimizes Kalshi's election betting markets by tying payouts to the most trusted source in election reporting, which should boost trader confidence and potentially attract institutional money.

articles.title: Underdog Cuts Jobs While Pivoting to Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Underdog Fantasy is laying off employees as it shifts focus from daily fantasy sports to prediction markets. The move signals another major player entering the space, which could bring fresh capital and mainstream legitimacy to political and event betting.

articles.title: Kalshi licenses election data from the AP
articles.summary: Kalshi has struck a deal with the Associated Press to use their election data, likely for settling election betting markets on their platform. This gives Kalshi access to AP's gold standard election calls, which should speed up market resolution and boost credibility with bettors who want fast, authoritative settlements.

articles.title: Polymarket user wins big on Israeli-US Iran strike bet
articles.summary: A Polymarket trader scored a major win betting on whether Israel or the US would strike Iran, likely capitalizing on recent Middle East tensions. The big payout shows how geopolitical prediction markets can deliver massive returns for traders willing to bet on volatile international events.

articles.title: Prediction markets point to Talarico-Paxton showdown in Texas Senate race
articles.summary: Prediction markets are signaling that Democrat James Talarico and Republican Angela Paxton will face off in a key Texas Senate race, suggesting these two have emerged as the clear frontrunners. This matchup matters because Texas races often see wild swings in betting odds as demographic shifts collide with traditional red-state assumptions, creating profit opportunities for sharp bettors who can read the state's evolving political landscape.

articles.title: A Former Top Trump Official Is Going After Prediction Markets
articles.summary: A former senior Trump administration official is launching some kind of challenge or criticism against prediction markets. This could signal incoming regulatory pressure or political scrutiny that might shake up how these platforms operate in the US.

articles.title: Prediction market bets on Iran strikes stoke insider trading, ethics scrutiny
articles.summary: Regulators are examining prediction markets that allowed betting on Iran-related events, likely around military strikes or political developments in the Middle East. The scrutiny signals authorities are getting serious about which geopolitical events should be fair game for betting, potentially reshaping what markets can legally offer.

articles.title: Polymarket defends its decision to allow betting on war as ‘invaluable’
articles.summary: Polymarket is pushing back against criticism of its war-related betting markets, calling them "invaluable" for information discovery. The defense signals prediction markets are doubling down on controversial topics despite regulatory pressure, potentially setting the stage for broader fights over what can and can't be traded.

articles.title: Supreme Court Could Decide Future of Sports Prediction Markets
articles.summary: The Supreme Court is weighing a case that could reshape how sports prediction markets operate in the US. If they rule broadly on market regulation or state versus federal jurisdiction, it could either unleash a wave of new betting platforms or slam the door shut on the industry's growth.
